message:
chore: add ephemeral file patterns to .gitignore

Add patterns for perf.data, perf_*.data, flamegraph SVGs,
storage.sqlite3, .agent-mail.yaml, and .beads/.br_history/
to prevent profiling data, runtime databases, agent coordination
config, and beads history snapshots from being tracked.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -40,3 +40,20 @@ a.out
 # Dependency upgrade progress (in-progress work)
 UPGRADE_LOG.md
 claude-upgrade-progress.json
+
+# Profiling and benchmark data
+perf.data
+perf.data.*
+perf_*.data
+perf_*.data.*
+flamegraph*.svg
+
+# Local scratch DBs
+storage.sqlite3
+storage.sqlite3-*
+
+# Agent coordination config
+.agent-mail.yaml
+
+# Beads history snapshots
+.beads/.br_history/
